LanguageData.WVC_XaG_GenelineMarkTooltip: This gene is not collected and was obtained from an external source.
LanguageData.WVC_XaG_Gene_Chimera_GizmoTip:
A chimera can <color=#aad8a2>collect</color> an unlimited number of genes. <color=#aad8a2>Collecting</color> methods depend on <color=#6bb6bb>abilities</color>.

<color=#aad8a2>Collected genes</color> can be implanted or removed at any time, but this will cause <color=#6bb6bb>genes</color> to <color=#6bb6bb>regrowing</color>. Genes are always <color=#6bb6bb>implanted</color> as <color=#6bb6bb>xenogenes</color>. Please note that a chimera cannot <color=#aad8a2>collect</color> its owner's genes.

<color=#b26160>Absorbed genes</color> cannot be <color=#aad8a2>collected</color> or <color=#6bb6bb>implanted</color>; these genes are lost for this particular chimera. Some genes give special effects depending on the <color=#b26160>absorbed</color> genes, the chimera does not have bonuses from this, but can get a random gene when it <color=#b26160>absorb</color>.
LanguageData.WVC_XaG_ChimeraDialog_PawnHasEndogene: Already has this gene as an endogene.
LanguageData.WVC_XaG_Gene_Chimera_LimitMessage: Maximum limit exceeded. Please remove some of the selected genes.
LanguageData.WVC_XaG_IGeneXenogenesEditor_InCooldown:
{0} cannot be used until genes regrowing is complete.
Absorbed genes
Chimera
It was not possible to implant some of the genes because they were overridden by existing ones.
Here you can select the genes collected by the pawn and implant them.
Xenogenes will be modified according to the selected geneset. This will trigger genes regrowing, the duration of which depends on the biostats of the selected genes and their quantity. Genes regrowing may limit some abilities and genes.\n\nIf the pawn already has genes regrowing, then all xenogene abilities will have a cooldown after implantation. All pawn xenogenes will be removed. If {0} is a xenogene, it will be reset and added as an endogene. The selected genes will be absorbed and will no longer be available for implantation, nor will they be able to be re-obtained. Depending on the gene, this effect may have its own benefits.
Share Share genes with an unknown source with a small chance of obtaining tool genes. The genes will be lost, but they can be obtained again.
Some of the selected genes are mutually exclusive.
Pawn has no xenogenes
Genes are not selected.
The total metabolism should be between {0} and {1}. Current metabolism {2}.
Chimera evolution applied.
{0} gene is implanted. {0} copied the {1} gene. {0} obtained the {1} gene. {0}'s genes were harvested, {0}'s xenotype was reset to the baseliner. Warning: {PAWN_nameDef}'s genes are currently regrowing. If {PAWN_pronoun} will be harvested before {PAWN_possessive} genes are fully regrown, it will kill {PAWN_objective}.\n\nAre you sure you wish to continue? {0}'s genes were obtained.
{0} was devoured!
Warning: {PAWN_nameDef} will be killed and {PAWN_possessive} body will be destroyed. If the pawn is a human, then {PAWN_nameDef}'s genes will be absorbed and {PAWN_possessive} skill experience will be inherited by the caster.\n\nAre you sure you wish to continue?
{0} ripped the {1} gene.
The target has no intact body parts. The target has no genes that the chimera has not yet absorbed. Chimera is not active, ability cannot be used.
The preset must have a name. Preset saved. This chimera has no presets.
Preset name
Load Save
The selected preset will replace the selected genes.
Implant Absorb
Clear
Mark added to target.
Micro skipgate connection created.
Gene implanter is missing.
The implanter was unable to create a hybrid geneset. The target and caster's genetic metabolisms are incompatible.
Warning! After using the ability, half of the caster's genes will be lost. These genes are randomly selected relative to all the caster's genes and their number. This will also lead to the reimplantation of the current genes, which will lead to their reset.
Devour using the chimera gene.
Increase chimera archite limit
Entityty study is not complete or the pawn does not have the chimera gene.
Devour will destroy the fleshmass nucleus and completely transform the chimera. The pawn will lose some old endogenes and gain a number of new ones related to the fleshmass. The lost endogenes will be copied by the chimera gene and can be re-implanted later. These changes are irreversible and have some hidden dangers.\n\nAre you sure you wish to continue?
Devour will destroy the nociosphere and completely transform the chimera. The pawn will lose some old endogenes and gain a number of new ones. The lost endogenes will be copied by the chimera gene and can be re-implanted later. These changes are irreversible and have some hidden dangers.\n\nAre you sure you wish to continue?
The selected genes will be added to the gene set of gene {0}.
